title: How to Tell Who Seats Are Allocated To
excerpt: Hi all! How can I granularly tell who on my plan is allocated a seat. We have 8/10 seats used on our plan but I can’t see which users under my plan have those seats. We bill out the total annual cost by department at my …

posts.author: EmilyLeaderDog (Emily J Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all! How can I granularly tell who on my plan is allocated a seat. We have 8/10 seats used on our plan but I can’t see which users under my plan have those seats. We bill out the total annual cost by department at my organization and need to know who is who. Is there a way to get that info?

Thanks!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EmilyLeaderDog Welcome to the community.

You need to be an overall account admin to see the users.

Under the Admin section of Monday.com you can see a full list or users and type of user guest / paid /viewer etc. Can you ask the account admin for a copy perhaps? or ask them to filter and send a screenshot of your deparment view?

image645×386 62.6 KB

Here is a helpful article showing how to navigate to the user management section.

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002426980-How-to-manage-users-on-your-account
